svg.title: React on Metal YouTube banner
svg.desc: Dark navy 16:9 banner with centered text, large faint embedded-react icon as background watermark, single PCB trace top and bottom

text.style: font-family: var(--font-sans), system-ui, sans-serif;;fill:rgb(56, 189, 248);stroke:none;color:rgb(0, 0, 0);stroke-width:1px;stroke-linecap:butt;stroke-linejoin:miter;opacity:1;font-family:"Anthropic Sans", sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif;font-size:46px;font-weight:600;text-anchor:middle;dominant-baseline:auto

font-family: var(--font-sans), system-ui, sans-serif;;fill:rgb(56, 189, 248);stroke:none;color:rgb(0, 0, 0);stroke-width:1px;stroke-linecap:butt;stroke-linejoin:miter;opacity:0.52;font-family:"Anthropic Sans", sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif;font-size:15px;font-weight:400;text-anchor:middle;dominant-baseline:auto

svg.text: Building React UI for embedded systems

text.style: font-family: var(--font-mono), 'Courier New', monospace;;fill:rgb(56, 189, 248);stroke:none;color:rgb(0, 0, 0);stroke-width:1px;stroke-linecap:butt;stroke-linejoin:miter;opacity:0.32;font-family:ui-monospace, monospace, "Courier New", monospace;font-size:13px;font-weight:400;text-anchor:middle;dominant-baseline:auto
